articles.title: 伊朗战事最新动态：特朗普称美国在伊朗救回落战机上的军官
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Rescues Officer From Downed Fighter Jet in Iran, Trump Says
articles.summary: 据官员透露，美伊两军为抵达这名受伤飞行员所在地展开了两天争夺，美国最终成功完成救援。此前以色列已于周六袭击伊朗最大的石油化工工业综合体，区域局势骤然紧张。
articles.summary_original: The rescue followed a two-day race between U.S. and Iranian forces to reach the injured airman, officials said. On Saturday, Israel attacked Iran’s largest petrochemical industrial complex.

articles.title: 伊朗击落美机 美方大胆营救令双方均态度强硬
articles.title_original: Iran Downing of Plane and Daring U.S. Rescue Leave Both Sides Emboldened
articles.summary: 伊朗击落一架美军飞机后，美方开展为期两天的复杂营救行动，成功将受困滞留的美军飞行员救出。这一系列事件令伊美双方态度均更趋强硬，存在地区局势进一步升级的潜在风险。
articles.summary_original: Iran’s downing of a U.S. plane and the complex two-day American rescue operation to extract a stranded airman has emboldened both sides, a potential recipe for escalation.

articles.title: 亚马逊Echo如何学会说话与聆听
articles.title_original: How the Amazon Echo learned to talk — and listen
articles.summary: 亚马逊创始人杰夫·贝佐斯一直渴望打造语音电脑，早在亚马逊发展初期，他就公开对外表达这一愿景，提出语音能让人机交互更便捷自然，同时也方便用户在平台购物，随后亚马逊组建团队启动了Echo相关研发工作。
articles.summary_original: Jeff Bezos badly wanted a voice computer. He had been saying so publicly since the very early days of Amazon, telling anyone who would listen about why voice might make it easier and more natural to interact with technology. (And to buy stuff from Jeff Bezos.) But when a team at Amazon set out to […]

articles.title: 清明，他们在烈士陵园守护一段长征记忆 - chinanews.com.cn
articles.summary: 清明时节，各地开展慎终追远缅怀英烈的相关活动，其中不乏围绕守护长征红色记忆开展的纪念活动。白山消防救援支队等多家单位组织英烈祭扫仪式，各界民众致敬忠魂，通过纪念活动弘扬英烈精神，赓续红色血脉，汲取奋进力量。

articles.title: 雪山桃花间的最美夕阳红：林芝桃花节“银发”专场上演 - 羊城晚报
articles.summary: 西藏林芝举办第二十三届桃花旅游文化节，活动特别设置“银发”专场，四月的林芝雪山环绕盛放桃林，素有“雪域江南”之称，吸引不少中老年游客赴此地寻春探桃源，该活动获得羊城晚报、新华网、央视网、澎湃新闻等多家媒体关注报道。

articles.title: 关于伊朗击落F-15E"攻击鹰"战机的已知信息
articles.title_original: What We Know About the F-15E Strike Eagle Shot Down by Iran
articles.summary: 此前一架F-15E"攻击鹰"战机被伊朗击落，美国方面随即展开针对机上人员的救援行动。总统特朗普披露，救援人员深入伊朗腹地，经过为期两天的高危救援行动，一名飞行员已于周六晚间成功获救。
articles.summary_original: An airman was rescued on Saturday night, President Trump said. The rescue came after a risky two-day operation deep inside Iran.

articles.title: Grammarly的乌龙分身风波
articles.title_original: Grammarly’s sloppelganger saga
articles.summary: 科技类每周通讯《The Stepback》每期拆解一则核心科技事件，内容于美国东部时间早8点推送至订阅者邮箱，读者可在线订阅，也可关注斯蒂夫·博尼菲尔德获取更多AI行业动向，本次内容开篇梳理Grammarly相关事件的起源。
articles.summary_original: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the ups and downs of AI, follow Stevie Bonifield. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Most people probably know Grammarly for its browser […]

articles.title: Grammarly的糟糕分身风波
articles.title_original: Grammarly’s sloppelganger saga
articles.summary: 科技类每周通讯《The Stepback》主打剖析科技领域核心事件，由史蒂维·博尼菲尔德跟进AI行业的起伏动态，该通讯每周美国东部时间早8点推送至订阅者邮箱，读者可在线订阅，本期内容围绕Grammarly的相关事件展开
articles.summary_original: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the ups and downs of AI, follow Stevie Bonifield. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Most people probably know Grammarly for its browser […]

articles.title: 英魂永耀山河间——致敬复兴征程上以身许国的中国共产党人 - 中国网新闻中心
articles.summary: 多家国内主流媒体推出“家国永念”相关主题内容，致敬复兴征程上以身许国的中国共产党人，重温习近平总书记讲述过的动人英雄故事，传递“平凡铸就伟大，英雄来自人民”的理念，缅怀民族英魂，号召大众铭记英烈奉献，传承英雄精神。

articles.title: 利奥教皇呼吁和平 警示世界对暴力漠不关心
articles.title_original: Pope Leo Calls for Peace and Warns of a World Indifferent to Violence
articles.summary: 教皇利奥此前在棕枝主日的布道中就明确表示，上帝不接纳“发动战争者”的祈祷。此番他在复活节发表讲话，再次呼吁全球和平，并对当前世界对暴力持冷漠态度的现状发出警示。
articles.summary_original: The pontiff’s Easter remarks follow a Palm Sunday homily in which he said God rejected the prayers of “those who wage war.”

articles.title: 载伊拉克货物油轮被观测到途经霍尔木兹海峡
articles.title_original: Oil Tanker Carrying Iraqi Cargo Seen Transiting Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: 伊朗一天前宣布邻国伊拉克获得使用霍尔木兹海峡航道的特殊豁免，次日就有观测显示，一艘装载伊拉克原油的油轮正在途经这一全球石油运输的关键海上咽喉通道航行。
articles.summary_original: An oil tanker carrying crude from Iraq appeared to be transiting the Strait of Hormuz chokepoint, a day after Iran said its neighbor had special exemption to use the waterway.

articles.title: 美国战斗机在伊朗上空被击落　一文看清目前所知情况 - BBC
articles.summary: 多家外媒梳理美军机在伊朗上空被击落事件的各方公开信息：美国总统特朗普称被击落战机飞行员全部获救，伊朗方面则称被击落的是一架美军搜救飞机。双方对事件中的坠机数量说法不一，伊朗媒体称多名美军在营救行动中身亡，美军试图摧毁遇难者遗体。

articles.title: 伊朗境内美国飞行员营救行动目前已知情况
articles.title_original: What we know so far about rescue of US airman in Iran
articles.summary: 一架美军F-15战机在伊朗南部区域被击落后，机上一名美军飞行员失踪，这一跨境事件引发国际各界广泛关注。目前美国已经成功开展行动，将这名失踪的美军飞行员营救出来。
articles.summary_original: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

articles.title: 拦截导弹可挽救生命，但其库存正不断缩减
articles.title_original: Interceptor Missiles Save Lives, but Stockpiles Are Dwindling
articles.summary: 可击落空中来袭弹药的拦截防御系统，目前已成为现代战争中最重要的作战组成部分之一。这类装备能在冲突中挽救生命，因使用需求大，当前各国军方正面临拦截导弹库存不断缩减的问题。
articles.summary_original: Defense systems that shoot projectiles out of the sky have become one of the most important components of warfare, so much so that militaries face a diminishing supply.

articles.title: 代表称战事背景下欧佩克+计划推出象征性石油配额上调
articles.title_original: OPEC+ Plans Symbolic Oil Quota Hike Amid War, Delegates Say
articles.summary: 欧佩克+成员国计划今年5月上调石油产量配额。当前中东冲突持续，已经制约了该联盟多个主要成员国的石油产量与运输，因此此次配额上调属于象征性举措。
articles.summary_original: OPEC+ members plan to raise their production quotas for May, a symbolic move as the Middle East conflict constrains output and shipments from several of the alliance’s largest members.

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 清华系团队研发矿石AI智能分选机，完成近2亿元C轮融资
articles.summary: 清华系核心团队创立的北京霍里思特，是国内可全矿种落地的矿石AI智能分选设备供应商，其推出的无水AI干选设备适配选矿行业绿色智能化升级需求，近日完成近2亿元C轮融资，本轮资金将用于核心技术研发、全球化业务拓展及团队建设。

articles.title: 因供应缺口 意大利部分机场实施航空燃油限额
articles.title_original: Italy Sets Jet Fuel Limits at Some Airports on Supply Gap
articles.summary: 中东冲突目前暂无结束迹象，受该冲突影响意大利出现航空燃油供应缺口，该国多个机场已发布供应预警通告，明确在接下来数日将对部分机场的航空燃油供应实施限量管控。
articles.summary_original: Several airports in Italy issued advisories of limited fuel supplies for the next few days as the conflict in the Middle East shows few signs of ending.

articles.title: 丹那塔拉以1.59亿美元交易推进资管机构合并
articles.title_original: Danantara Advances Asset Manager Merger With $159 Million Deal
articles.summary: 印尼主权财富基金丹那塔拉正推进一项规模达1.59亿美元的交易，计划合并该国多家国有银行旗下的资产管理部门，此举旨在提升合并后资管机构的区域竞争力。
articles.summary_original: Indonesia’s sovereign wealth fund is advancing a plan to combine the asset management units of state-owned lenders to boost their regional competitiveness.

articles.title: 中国打造了全球无人机产业 如今正收紧空域管控
articles.title_original: China Built the World’s Drone Industry. Now It’s Locking Down the Skies.
articles.summary: 中国政府收紧无人机相关管理规定，旨在打击各类非法无人机活动。不过不少无人机用户认为，当前新规管控范围过宽，在禁止非法飞行的同时，也对诸多正常合法的无人机飞行活动造成了过多限制。
articles.summary_original: The Chinese government tightened rules to curb what it described as illegal drone use, but some users say the changes are now restricting too many flights.

articles.title: 伊朗袭击海湾阿拉伯国家期间美军救出失踪飞行员
articles.title_original: US Rescues Missing Airman as Iran Strikes Gulf Arab States
articles.summary: 美军一架战斗机被伊朗击落后，美军从伊朗境内成功救回一名飞行员。伊朗对海湾阿拉伯国家发动的持续袭击引发火灾，造成科威特石油总部受损，阿联酋一家石化工厂因此关闭停产。
articles.summary_original: US forces rescued an airman from Iran after his fighter jet was shot down, while the Islamic Republic’s continued attacks sparked fires that damaged Kuwait’s oil headquarters and shut down an Emirati petrochemicals plant.

articles.title: 清明返乡潮：一笔沉甸甸的城乡情感账 - 泉州新闻
articles.summary: 清明将至，多家媒体围绕清明推出各类主题内容：泉州新闻聚焦清明返乡潮，探讨这一现象背后沉甸甸的城乡情感联结；其余多家媒体分别从诗意解读、时评感悟、节令科普等维度，挖掘清明承载的思念内核与文化价值。

articles.title: 多地祭扫缅怀先烈寄哀思 传承红色基因 - news.china.com
articles.summary: news.china.com推出相关报道，我国多地组织开展缅怀先烈祭扫活动，参与民众借此向为民族解放、国家建设事业牺牲的革命先烈寄托深切哀思，这类活动也引导大众铭记革命历史，传承红色基因。

articles.title: 假期首日市属公园迎客58.57万人次 天坛公园、颐和园、玉渊潭公园位列前三 - 北京市人民政府网站
articles.summary: 清明假期北京市属公园迎来春日游园高峰，假期首日共接待游客58.57万人次，天坛公园、颐和园、玉渊潭公园客流量位列前三。假期次日客流量升至87.36万人次，各公园推出赏花、非遗体验等多元活动，以精细化服务保障游客游园。

articles.title: 伊朗石化经济特区遭空袭，已致5死170伤！特朗普称“打死多名伊朗军事领导人”，伊朗拒绝“48小时”通牒，以军将领认为伊朗政权依然稳固 - 每日经济新闻
articles.summary: 伊朗一石化经济特区遭空袭，已造成5人死亡、170人受伤。特朗普称此次打击已清除多名伊朗军事领导人，还向伊朗发出48小时通牒，伊朗军方强硬拒绝该通牒，称将让侵略者付出代价，以军将领认为伊朗政权依然稳固，目前美战机飞行员搜救仍在推进。

articles.title: 高端智能投影品牌AWOL Vision获近亿元B轮融资，新品拿下近2000万美金众筹｜硬氪首发
articles.summary: 高端智能投影品牌AWOL Vision近日完成近亿元B轮融资，投资方包括天堂硅谷等多家机构，资金将用于技术研发、生态构建与全球化运营拓展。该品牌新品超短焦激光投影众筹募得近2000万美元，累计众筹超2亿元，是国内首个完成双千万美元级市场验证的消费电子品牌。

articles.title: 柬埔寨为著名探雷鼠竖立雕像
articles.title_original: Cambodia unveils statue to honour famous landmine-sniffing rat
articles.summary: 柬埔寨为已故的非洲巨囊鼠建造雕像，以此纪念这只功勋探雷鼠。这只探雷鼠生前依靠出色的嗅觉，一共嗅出超过100枚地雷，为当地清除爆炸隐患、保障民众安全作出了突出贡献。
articles.summary_original: The statue honours the late African giant pouched rat who sniffed out more than 100 landmines during his lifetime.

articles.title: 尹力和张升民在北京参加义务植树活动 - 联合早报
articles.summary: 多家媒体发布生态建设领域相关报道，尹力、张升民在北京参加义务植树活动。此外，多家媒体围绕植树造林、美丽中国建设推出相关内容，聚焦我国增绿护绿实践，解读“向绿而行、以绿赋能”的绿色发展路径，展现中国持续推进生态文明建设的方向。

articles.title: 以军称即将空袭黎叙边境口岸 战火重燃已致黎方1422人死亡 - chinanews.com.cn
articles.summary: 以色列军方称即将对黎巴嫩与叙利亚的边境口岸发动空袭。自本轮黎以战火重燃以来，冲突已经造成黎巴嫩方面1422人死亡，当前地区局势持续紧张，战事存在进一步升级的明显风险。

articles.title: 纽约一婴儿在婴儿车内遭枪杀 一名男子被起诉
articles.title_original: Man charged over fatal shooting of baby in pram in New York
articles.summary: 美国纽约威廉斯堡发生一起致命枪击案，一名七个月大的婴儿在婴儿车内中枪身亡。目前该案已有两名涉案男子被捕，其中一名男子已因这起命案被正式提起指控。
articles.summary_original: Two men have been arrested over the shooting of a seven-month-old baby in Williamsburg.

articles.title: 国际部队陆续入境海地 海地大屠杀致数十人死亡
articles.title_original: Dozens Killed in Haiti Massacre as International Force Trickles In
articles.summary: 上周末，黑帮攻入海地多个农村社区，制造大屠杀造成数十人死亡。联合国支持的新型镇暴部队正逐步进入海地，这起恶性事件凸显出这支新国际部队将面临诸多严峻挑战。
articles.summary_original: Gangs tore through several rural communities last weekend, underscoring the challenges that will face the new, U.N.-backed Gang Suppression Force starting to enter the country.

articles.title: 欧尔班谋求匈牙利连任第四届 人工智能视频助推选战舆论
articles.title_original: AI videos fuel rhetoric as Orbán bids for four more years in Hungary
articles.summary: 匈牙利现任总理维克托·欧尔班已执政16年，此番正角逐第四个任期谋求连任。选战中出现多支针对欧尔班选举对手的人工智能视频，该对手具备在此次选举中终结欧尔班执政地位的可能性，这些AI视频正助推选战舆论升温。
articles.summary_original: Videos have targeted Viktor Orbán's election rival, who could unseat him after 16 years in office.

articles.title: 伊朗无人机袭击致科威特石油设施及总部受损
articles.title_original: Kuwait Oil Facilities, HQ Damaged by Iran Drone Strikes
articles.summary: 伊朗发动无人机袭击，于夜间至周日对科威特石油领域发起新一轮攻击。科威特能源总部先遭无人机纵火，数小时后，该国炼油分支运营设施与一处石化工厂遇袭并引发火灾，多处设施受损。
articles.summary_original: Kuwait’s oil sector came under a fresh barrage of attacks overnight and into Sunday as drone strikes sparked fires at operational facilities at its refining arm and petrochemical plant, hours after the country’s energy headquarters were set ablaze by unmanned drones.

articles.title: 特朗普欲达成驱逐出境协议 威权统治者已做好接洽准备
articles.title_original: Trump Wants to Make Deportation Deals. Autocrats Are Ready to Listen.
articles.summary: 美国白宫已将驱逐出境这一标志性国内议题，转化为美国对外政策的核心组成部分。目前特朗普正推动达成相关驱逐协议，多国威权统治者已做好接洽准备，现有公开信息梳理了这一项目的相关情况。
articles.summary_original: The White House has turned deportations, a signature domestic issue, into a major piece of foreign policy. Here’s what we know about the program.

articles.title: 致命地震与洪水加剧阿富汗困境
articles.title_original: Deadly Earthquake and Floods Worsen Afghanistan’s Troubles
articles.summary: 阿富汗近期连发自然灾害，本周该国洪水已造成至少77人死亡，数千栋房屋被摧毁或受损，周五又发生地震，额外造成十余人死亡，多重灾害接踵而至，进一步加剧了阿富汗本就棘手的诸多困境。
articles.summary_original: Floods have killed at least 77 people this week and destroyed or damaged thousands of homes, and an earthquake on Friday killed a dozen more.

articles.title: 彼得·泰尔大手笔押注太阳能牛项圈
articles.title_original: Peter Thiel’s big bet on solar-powered cow collars
articles.summary: 知名投资人彼得·泰尔旗下的创始人基金，向牛只管理初创企业Halter注资2.2亿美元，此次投资押注的核心方向是该企业开发的、用于牛群管理的太阳能牛项圈项目，这笔投向农业科技领域的大额投资引发行业关注。
articles.summary_original: Why did Founders Fund invest $220 million in cattle management startup Halter?

articles.title: 美国称已逮捕已故伊朗将军卡西姆·苏莱曼尼的亲属
articles.title_original: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
articles.summary: 美国官员对外证实，已故伊朗高级将领卡西姆·苏莱曼尼的侄女与侄孙女，目前已被美国移民与海关执法局羁押。苏莱曼尼2020年遭美军空袭身亡，此次其亲属被美方逮捕引发外界广泛关注。
articles.summary_original: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

articles.title: 德国45岁以下男性长期境外停留或需军方批准
articles.title_original: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
articles.summary: 德国出台相关新规，要求该国45岁以下男性若计划长期在境外停留，需获得军方批准。根据该新规对应的法律条款，这类出行申请通常都会被准予，目前尚不明确若违反该规定，相关规则将如何具体执行。
articles.summary_original: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.

articles.title: 深陷争议的初创公司Delve与Y Combinator分道扬镳
articles.title_original: Embattled startup Delve has ‘parted ways’ with Y Combinator
articles.summary: Delve是一家专注合规领域的初创公司，目前深陷相关争议，这场风波似乎已经让它失去了与全球知名创业加速器Y Combinator的合作关系，双方已经结束合作，正式分道扬镳。
articles.summary_original: The controversy around Delve appears to have cost the compliance startup its relationship with accelerator Y Combinator.

articles.title: 伊朗战争后首份通胀数据料显示美国通胀飙升
articles.title_original: US Inflation Seen Spiking in First Snapshot Since Iran War
articles.summary: 美国消费者近期已感受到汽油价格突然上涨的影响，这种变化将在下周公布的美国关键通胀数据中充分体现。这份数据是伊朗战争爆发后发布的首份相关通胀数据，市场普遍预期它将显示美国通胀大幅飙升。
articles.summary_original: The sudden increase in US gasoline prices felt by American consumers is set to be on full display in key inflation data due out this coming week.

articles.title: 俄军袭击乌克兰市场致五人死亡
articles.title_original: Russian attack on Ukraine market kills five
articles.summary: 周六早上，俄罗斯无人机袭击乌克兰南部城镇一处市场内的人流繁忙区域，本次袭击事件造成五人死亡，另有二十一人受伤。遇袭区域人员密集，这是俄罗斯对乌军事行动中最新一起造成伤亡的袭击事件。
articles.summary_original: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.

articles.title: 世界最高龄领导人执政43年来首次将配备副手
articles.title_original: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
articles.summary: 现年93岁的喀麦隆总统保罗·比亚是全球最高龄国家领导人，已连续执政43年。去年他在存在争议的选举中胜出，成功赢得第八个总统任期，如今将在任内首次配备副手。
articles.summary_original: Cameroon's President Paul Biya, 93, won his eighth successive term last year in a disputed election.

articles.title: 斯莱彭称欧洲央行将讨论加息或维持利率不变：播客
articles.title_original: Sleijpen Says ECB Discussion Will Be Rate Hike or Hold: Podcast
articles.summary: 欧洲央行管理委员会成员奥拉夫·斯莱彭表示，欧洲央行接下来的货币政策讨论将仅在两个选项中做抉择，要么上调利率，要么维持当前利率水平不变，这一表态出自相关播客节目。
articles.summary_original: The European Central Bank’s next discussion will between increasing interest rates or holding them steady, according to Governing Council member Olaf Sleijpen.

articles.title: 一名民谣音乐人成为AI造假与版权流氓的目标
articles.title_original: A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
articles.summary: 今年一月，民谣艺人墨菲·坎贝尔发现流媒体平台Spotify的个人主页上，多出数首她本人从未上传的歌曲。经她判断，这些歌曲是盗用她发布在YouTube的表演素材，由AI生成假人声后非法上传，她沦为AI造假与版权侵权的目标。
articles.summary_original: In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that did not belong there. They were songs that she had recorded, but she'd never uploaded them to Spotify, and something was off about the vocals. She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the songs she posted to YouTube, created […]

articles.title: 一名民谣音乐家成AI造假与版权流氓的目标
articles.title_original: A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
articles.summary: 今年一月，民谣艺人墨菲·坎贝尔发现自己的Spotify个人主页被擅自上传了多首作品，这些作品虽原本由她创作，但人声存在异常。她很快推断，有人抓取了她发布在YouTube的表演内容，通过AI生成假作品，她也成为相关侵权行为的目标。

She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the songs she posted to YouTube, created […]

articles.title: 巴基斯坦称将向阿联酋偿还到期贷款存款
articles.title_original: Pakistan Says It Will Repay Matured Loan Deposits to UAE
articles.summary: 巴基斯坦方面表示，该国将向阿联酋偿还到期贷款存款。这一还款操作将对这个南亚国家的外汇储备造成压力，进一步推高巴方外汇储备层面的紧张程度，给本就吃紧的官方储备带来了额外负担。
articles.summary_original: Pakistan will return matured loan deposits to the United Arab Emirates, in a move that will strain the South Asian nation’s reserves.

articles.title: 彭博周末节目 2026年4月4日
articles.title_original: Bloomberg This Weekend 04/04/2026
articles.summary: 彭博推出的周末新闻节目，即便市场休市新闻播报也不中断。本次节目由三位主持人在纽约直播，解读周末重大头条，带来清晰分析、背景梳理与趣味内容，本期邀请了政治、军政、商界、学界多个领域嘉宾参与，信息来源为彭博。
articles.summary_original: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Axios Senior Politics Reporter Marc Caputo, Former Assistant Secretary of State for Political-Military Affairs Under George Bush Brigadier General Mark Kimmitt, Napster Corp. CEO John Acunto, Pulsar Helium President Cliff Cain, “The Infinity Machine” Author Sebastian Mallaby, Democratic National Co

articles.title: Anthropic称Claude Code订阅用户使用OpenClaw需额外付费
articles.title_original: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
articles.summary: 人工智能企业Anthropic近日宣布，其旗下Claude Code的现有订阅用户，在使用OpenClaw及其他第三方工具搭配该平台编码助手时，需要支付额外费用，用户的该项使用成本即将上涨。
articles.summary_original: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

articles.title: Anthropic：Claude Code订阅用户使用OpenClaw需额外付费
articles.title_original: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
articles.summary: 人工智能企业Anthropic宣布，旗下编程辅助产品Claude Code的订阅用户，使用OpenClaw以及其他第三方工具时，不再包含在原有订阅权益范围内，需要额外支付费用方可使用，用户的相关使用成本将有所上升。
articles.summary_original: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

articles.title: 塔吉特买两款任天堂Switch游戏立减30美元
articles.title_original: Buy two Nintendo Switch games, get $30 off at Target
articles.summary: 零售商塔吉特面向部分Target Circle会员推出优惠，购买两款任天堂Switch游戏可享30美元减免。本次优惠仅剩余当日剩余时长，将于美国东部时间4月5日凌晨2点59分到期，用户注册免费会员即可参与活动。
articles.summary_original: Target is offering a great deal to some Target Circle members that knocks $30 off the cost of two Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 games. The sale is happening for the rest of the day, expiring at 2:59AM ET on April 5th. If you sign in with the free-to-join membership, you might be able to […]

articles.title_original: My dream pair of AR gaming glasses needs to have these nine features
articles.summary: 作者耗时数月测试Xreal与Viture推出的最新款AR眼镜，文中所说的“实验室”其实是家中沙发，作者每晚在此佩戴AR眼镜，连接Steam Deck或任天堂Switch 2，独享专属巨幅虚拟屏幕，还分享了理想AR游戏眼镜的九项必备特性。

articles.title: 对抗恶意软件数十年 这名网络安全老将如今研究无人机黑客技术
articles.title_original: After fighting malware for decades, this cybersecurity veteran is now hacking drones
articles.summary: 米科·海普宁是全球网络安全领域最知名的人物之一，他已经从事对抗计算机病毒、蠕虫和恶意软件的工作超过35年，近期他接受TechCrunch采访，谈及自己为何转而研发拦截致命无人机的相关系统。
articles.summary_original: Mikko Hyppönen is one of the most recognizable faces of the cybersecurity industry. After fighting computer viruses, worms, and malware, for more than 35 years, he tells TechCrunch why he is now working on systems to stop killer drones.

articles.title: 你真的没用AI做出这个？拿出证据

articles.summary_original: "This looks like AI." It's a phrase I dread seeing as a writer who dabbles in illustration and amateur photography. In a world where generative AI technology is increasingly adept at mimicking the work of humans, people are naturally skeptical when online platforms refuse to label even obvious AI content. articles.title: 《超级肉肉哥3D》让受苦变乐趣
articles.title_original: Super Meat Boy 3D makes suffering fun
articles.summary: 《超级肉肉哥》原作是史上最知名的独立游戏之一，2010年推出，是难度极高的2D平台跳跃游戏。它的短关卡接近速通解谜，虽遍布陷阱与电锯，但死亡后可立刻复活，游玩趣味性十足，新作《超级肉肉哥3D》主打让充满挑战的受苦过程也充满乐趣。
articles.summary_original: The original Super Meat Boy is one of the best-known indie games of all time. articles.title: 因谋杀被通缉的在逃黑手党头目于阿玛尔菲海岸豪华别墅落网
articles.title_original: Fugitive mafia boss wanted for murder arrested in Amalfi Coast luxury villa
articles.summary: 警方日前抓获涉谋杀被通缉的在逃黑手党头目罗伯托·马扎雷拉，落网地点位于阿玛尔菲海岸的一处豪华别墅。据披露，该头目已逃亡超过一年，落网前一直使用假名隐瞒身份藏匿。
articles.summary_original: Roberto Mazzarella has been on the run for more than a year and was living under a false name, police say.

articles.title: 战争期间伊朗人在大自然中寻求喘息
articles.title_original: Iranians Seek Respite in Nature Amid the War
articles.summary: 战争背景下，伊朗新年假期进入尾声，本周许多伊朗家庭抓住这一短暂间隙，走出家门来到户外聚集，开展野餐、游戏等活动，借机庆祝节日，在自然中忙里偷闲，寻求片刻的放松与安宁。
articles.summary_original: Families gathered for picnics and games this week to mark the end of the Iranian new year holiday, seizing on a brief chance to celebrate.

articles.title: 安克星云P1投影仪：便携领域音质之王
articles.title_original: Anker’s Nebula P1 projector is the portable sound king

articles.summary_original: The Soundcore Nebula P1 from Anker isn't the most portable Google TV projector I've ever reviewed, nor is it the brightest. It doesn't even have a built-in battery. Instead it's a decent video device that focuses on sound. The Nebula P1's standout feature is a pair of speakers that detach to create true left- and […]

articles.title: 阿尔忒弥斯二号机组抵月行程过半 拍下壮观地球照片
articles.title_original: Artemis II crew now halfway to Moon as they take 'spectacular' image of Earth
articles.summary: 阿尔忒弥斯二号任务的机组人员正搭乘猎户座飞船前往月球，目前整个行程已经过半。任务指挥官里德·怀斯曼在猎户座飞船舱内，拍摄到了这张极为壮观的地球照片。
articles.summary_original: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.

articles.title: 一群00后极客和这家机器人公司共处72小时
articles.summary: 全球首届具身智能开发者大会在深圳举办，20组以00后为主的选手获充足算力、硬件支持，在72小时内攻关机械臂具身智能任务。赛事设A/B榜考验模型泛化性，直指行业痛点，主办方自变量机器人希望聚集开发者，推动具身智能落地、打造开放生态。
